name: The Psionicist
concept: You walked the inner path and woke the Way — the quiet power of a disciplined mind. No god granted it and no king can strip it from you. But it is yours alone to pay for, and the strain is real.
duty: The Way answers the still mind. Reach in fear or fury and it answers that, too, and the answer is worse.

look.label: Tell
options: you answer questions not yet asked
you touch your brow when you focus

gear.label: Focus
options: nothing at all; the mind is enough

gear.label: Ward
options: a disciple's robes that hide much

gear.label: Keepsake
options: a scar from the day the Way woke
a list of others who walk the path

moves.name: The Way
moves.trigger: When you turn the mind's power on the world — to move, sense, shield, strike, or link.

results.success: The discipline works as you will it.
results.failure: The power slips your grip, and the strain is all you get for reaching.
advantage: Hold 1 Focus (spend: extend the effect to another target / no one perceives that you did it / skim a surface thought or intent / brace against the strain of your next effort).
You sense another mind or power stirring nearby.
threat: The strain shows: take a setback die until you can still your mind.
A psion-sensitive, or something on the Gray, feels you reach.
results.triumph: A surge: the discipline does far more than it should.
results.despair: You overreach and burn out. Lose this discipline until you rest deeply, or worse.

hold.name: Focus
spend: Extend the effect to a second target or a wider area.
Work the power so subtly that no one perceives it.
Skim a surface thought or read intent.
Brace your mind against the strain of your next effort.

moves.name: The Unseen Art
moves.trigger: Because the Way needs no word, gesture, or component:
moves.text: You can use your power without anyone knowing its source — but other psionicists, and certain beasts and horrors, can feel the Way whenever you draw on it. To them, you are never truly hidden.

moves.name: Mindlink
moves.trigger: When you open a silent link to a willing ally.

results.success: You speak mind to mind, wordless and unheard, for as long as you both concentrate.
results.failure: The link will not hold, or opens to the wrong mind.
advantage: Link a whole group at once.
Share not just words but a sense or an image.
threat: The effort leaves you both a little raw.
results.triumph: The link is effortless and deep; you act as one.
results.despair: You link to a mind that was waiting for you to.

moves.name: Read
moves.trigger: When you turn your senses on another mind to learn what drives it.

results.success: Ask the GM one, truthfully: what does this person most want? most fear? what are they hiding right now?
results.failure: Their mind is guarded, or you read a lie they believe themselves.
threat: What you see clings to you.
results.triumph: You see them whole, guards and all.
results.despair: There is something in there that looks back.

moves.name: Kinesis
moves.trigger: When you move, hold, or break a thing with your mind alone.

results.success: It moves as you will, within reason.
results.failure: It resists you, or moves wrong.
advantage: Do it with force enough to matter in a fight.
Do it to several small things at once.
threat: The strain bites: setback until you rest.
You move it, and knock something else loose.
results.triumph: You move something no arm could.
results.despair: The power lashes back at you or an ally.

moves.name: Mind Blade
moves.trigger: When you strike at a mind directly, or raise a shield of pure will against one.

results.success: Your strike lands past any armor, or your shield turns the attack.
results.failure: It fails, and the backlash is yours to bear.
advantage: Stagger the foe: they act badly next.
Shield an ally as well as yourself.
threat: The clash of wills costs you: setback until you rest.
results.triumph: You lay a mind low without touching the body.
results.despair: Your own mind takes the wound instead.

bonds: ____ walked part of the inner path with me; only they know what it cost.
____ is afraid of what I can do, and hides it badly.
I have read ____'s mind without their leave, and the guilt of it sits between us.
____ steadies me when the strain grows too much; I would be lost without them.
____ carries a wound in their mind that I could heal, or worsen.
communityTie: The Free Legion does not understand the Way; ____ trusts you anyway.
You keep the depth of your power hidden from the Legion; only ____ has seen it all.
The Legion's leaders would make you a weapon of interrogation; ____ argues that you are more than that.

basic: Take a move from another playbook.
Take a move from another playbook.
Increase your maximum held Focus by 1.
Open a new discipline: name a new use of the Way you can attempt.
Train a discipline you lean on: it upgrades 2 dice to proficiency (never more than its stat).
Deepen your calm: once per session, ignore the strain of one working.
advanced: Raise one stat by 1 (max 5). Rare, and only at a true turning point.
Master a discipline so wholly it no longer strains you at all.
Take students: found a Bastion (a quiet school of the Way) within or beside the Legion.
